title: finalize STALENESS_WEBHOOK_SECRET removal (deploy unblock)
description:
## Summary
Unblocks pod rollouts on the website deployment. The sealed secret no longer carries `STALENESS_WEBHOOK_SECRET`, but `k3d/website.yaml` still referenced it, producing `CreateContainerConfigError` on every restart.

- Cherry-pick **secrets(staleness): finalize STALENESS_WEBHOOK_SECRET removal + reseal** (already on `feature/mentolder-assistent`) so the resealed mentolder + korczewski sealed secrets are on `main`.
- Drop the `STALENESS_WEBHOOK_SECRET` env reference in the website Deployment. The webhook handler already defaults to `''` when the env is absent (`process.env.STALENESS_WEBHOOK_SECRET ?? ''`), so this is safe today; the wider feature removal stays in flight.

This is required so the editor fix from #574 (and the seeded Block 05 service card from ticket BR-20260507-47be) actually reach a running pod.

## Test plan
- [ ] After merge: `task website:redeploy ENV=mentolder` rolls out without `CreateContainerConfigError`
- [ ] New "Führung & Persönlichkeit" service card appears on web.mentolder.de homepage and `/fuehrung-persoenlichkeit` detail page resolves

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
